name: sheet
title: Sheet
description: A glass panel that slides in from any edge.

files.content:
<script lang="ts">
	import { Dialog as SheetPrimitive, type WithoutChild } from 'bits-ui';
	import { cn } from '$lib/utils.js';

	let {
		ref = $bindable(null),
		class: className,
		...restProps
	}: WithoutChild<SheetPrimitive.CloseProps> & { class?: string } = $props();
</script>

<SheetPrimitive.Close bind:ref class={cn(className)} {...restProps} />
{@render children?.()} Close

<script lang="ts">
	import { Dialog as SheetPrimitive, type WithoutChild } from 'bits-ui';
	import { cn } from '$lib/utils.js';

	let {
		ref = $bindable(null),
		class: className,
		...restProps
	}: WithoutChild<SheetPrimitive.DescriptionProps> & { class?: string } = $props();
</script>

<SheetPrimitive.Description
	bind:ref
	class={cn('text-sm text-muted-foreground', className)}
	{...restProps}
/>
{@render children?.()}
{@render children?.()}

<script lang="ts">
	import { Dialog as SheetPrimitive, type WithoutChild } from 'bits-ui';
	import { cn } from '$lib/utils.js';

	let {
		ref = $bindable(null),
		class: className,
		...restProps
	}: WithoutChild<SheetPrimitive.OverlayProps> & { class?: string } = $props();
</script>

<SheetPrimitive.Overlay
	bind:ref
	class={cn(
		'fixed inset-0 z-50 bg-[rgba(6,21,32,0.45)] backdrop-blur-sm transition-[opacity] duration-150 data-[state=closed]:opacity-0 data-[state=open]:opacity-100',
		className
	)}
	{...restProps}
/>

<SheetPrimitive.Title
	bind:ref

	{...restProps}
/>

<script lang="ts">
	import { Dialog as SheetPrimitive, type WithoutChild } from 'bits-ui';
	import { cn } from '$lib/utils.js';

	let {
		ref = $bindable(null),
		class: className,
		...restProps

<script lang="ts">
	import { Dialog as SheetPrimitive } from 'bits-ui';

	let { ...restProps }: SheetPrimitive.RootProps = $props();
</script>

<SheetPrimitive.Root {...restProps} />
